title: Koh Tao Boat Rental Tips for 2026: Costs, Licences and Best Bays
html:
Renting a boat in Koh Tao gives you access to isolated coves and snorkel spots unreachable from land. Departures from Mae Haad Pier can cost as little as 2,000 THB for a shared tour, while private charters start from 8,000 THB for a half-day trip. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Koh Tao or list your own.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Koh Tao?

Prices range from 2,000 THB per person for a shared trip to 60,000 THB for a crewed yacht charter. A small motorboat for half a day costs around 5,000 THB, and a full-day catamaran rental can reach 35,000 THB. The high season from December to April pushes rates up by 20 per cent, so booking early through a platform like yacht charter Koh Tao helps secure the best deal.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Koh Tao?

Most small motorboats can be hired without a licence if you take a short briefing from the operator. Larger yachts and catamarans typically require a valid International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or a local Thai licence. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator when you book, as rules differ between rental companies and insurance policies. In 2026, enforcement is expected to remain consistent with current practice.

Where to set off in Koh Tao

The main departure points are Mae Haad Pier, Chalok Baan Kao Bay, and the small jetty at Tanote Bay. Sai Daeng Beach and Aow Leuk Bay also have informal launching areas for smaller craft. Many charters include pickup from your resort by longtail boat, so you do not always need to reach a marina. The nearest port for larger yachts is Samui’s Nathon Pier, 45 nautical miles south.

Which boat to rent

  1. Longtail boat, Best for exploring shallow bays like Shark Bay and Mango Bay; carries up to 6 passengers; from 2,000 THB per person for a shared tour.
  2. Small motorboat (6, 8 m), Ideal for couples or small groups; carries up to 8; from 5,000 THB for a half-day rental.
  3. Catamaran (30, 40 ft), Stable and spacious for day trips to Koh Nang Yuan; carries up to 12; from 25,000 THB for a full day.
  4. Crewed motor yacht (e.g. Prestige 500), Luxury experience with a skipper; carries up to 10 overnight; from 50,000 THB per day; see the Prestige 500 listing for full specs.

Cost breakdown at a glance

  • Shared tour (longtail): 2,000, 3,000 THB per person
  • Small motorboat half-day: 5,000, 8,000 THB
  • Catamaran full-day with crew: 25,000, 35,000 THB
  • Crewed yacht full-day (e.g. Azimut 50): 45,000, 60,000 THB

When to visit and what to watch for

The best time for boat rental in Koh Tao is December to April, when the northeast monsoon brings calm seas and bright sunshine. From May to October, the southwest monsoon can generate squalls and steep chop, especially around the exposed western side of the island. The local wind known as the "Koh Tao breeze" often picks up in the afternoon, so most charters aim to return by 4pm.

Anchor on the leeward side of Koh Nang Yuan for the clearest snorkelling, the sandy bottom stays visible in 15 metres of water even when the tide is low.

At a glance

  • Price range: 2,000, 60,000 THB
  • Peak months: December to April
  • Trip length: 4 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 4, 12 guests (private)
  • Currency: THB (Thai Baht)

Questions about boat rental in Koh Tao

Can I rent a boat in Koh Tao without prior experience?

Yes, you can hire a small motorboat or join a guided tour without any boating experience if the operator provides a briefing.

What is the best way to get from Koh Tao to Koh Nang Yuan by boat?

A longtail or speedboat from Mae Haad Pier takes 15 minutes to Koh Nang Yuan, and many rental packages include snorkelling stops around the island.

Are there all-inclusive boat rental packages in Koh Tao?

Yes, many catamaran and yacht charters include lunch, soft drinks, snorkelling gear and fuel in the daily rate, typically starting at 25,000 THB.

Which boat model is most popular for families in Koh Tao?

The Lagoon 38 catamaran is a favourite for families because of its wide beam, stable ride and four cabins, accommodating up to 10 guests comfortably.

Whether you are comparing day trips or planning a private island hop, start with the BoatHire24 marketplace to see real availability and prices from local operators. If you own a boat in Koh Tao, you can list your boat on BoatHire24 to reach thousands of travellers worldwide.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Koh Tao and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
